caption: The scene is a vast, cinematic mountain valley at golden-hour sunset, rendered with photorealistic detail and vibrant, saturated colors. The overall tone is majestic and serene, capturing the dramatic beauty of a pristine natural landscape. Towering, rugged geological formations and sheer cliffs dominate the valley, their surfaces catching the warm, radiant light of the setting sun. Distant peaks are dusted with snow, contrasting with the verdant green slopes that characterize the mid-ground. Scattered pine trees dot the landscape, their dark silhouettes providing depth against the bright sky, while patches of colorful wildflowers add bursts of vivid hues across the green terrain. Several cascading waterfalls tumble down the cliffs, their waters glistening as they plunge into a crystal-clear turquoise lake that reflects the glowing sky. The sky itself is wide open and luminous, filled with soft, volumetric light that bathes the entire valley in a warm glow. The landscape is tastefully clean and not overgrown, allowing each element to stand out distinctly. The dramatic rocky formations rise sharply from the valley floor, with the lush green slopes extending from their bases. The pine trees are interspersed among the wildflowers, creating a natural mosaic of textures and colors. The waterfalls originate high on the cliffs, flowing down into the expansive turquoise lake that occupies a significant portion of the valley floor. The 360 scene is faultless.
